selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to be proactive in identifying and flagging false information. This can involve using fact-checking tools and sources, as well as reporting suspicious content to the platform or account responsible. Additionally, developing a critical thinking approach towards information on social media can help individuals distinguish between factual and fictional content. By being informed and vigilant, users can help mitigate the spread of misinformation and create a safer online environment.",
"reasoning_summary": "To identify fake content on social media, we must be proactive in using fact-checking tools and sources to verify information. We should also develop critical thinking skills to distinguish between factual and fictional content. By being vigilant and informed, we can help mitigate the spread of misinformation and create a safer online environment.",
"tone": "educated",
"citations": [],
"safety_notes": "",
"used_persona_fields": ["persona"]
}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to be proactive in identifying and flagging false information. This can involve using fact-checking tools and sources, as well as reporting suspicious content to the platform or account responsible. Additionally, developing a critical thinking approach towards information on social media can help individuals distinguish between factual and fictional content. By being informed and vigilant, users can help mitigate the spread of misinformation and create a safer online environment.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To identify fake content on social media, we must be proactive in using fact-checking tools and sources to verify information. We should also develop critical thinking skills to distinguish between factual and fictional content. By being vigilant and informed, we can help mitigate the spread of misinformation and create a safer online environment.
